Headline: Closure - St Joseph's College, Reading
Info: St Joseph's College has entered a formal consultation period regarding its potential permanent closure in July 2026, citing falling pupil numbers and increasing costs exacerbated by the introduction of VAT on independent school fees.

Headline: Financial - Kent, North Tyneside, and York State Schools, Various
Info: Three cash-strapped councils have been granted government permission to breach minimum per-pupil funding levels due to severe SEND deficits, leaving average-sized primary schools in Kent significantly worse off.

Headline: Closure - Ysgol Nebo and Ysgol Baladeulyn (State), Gwynedd
Info: Gwynedd Council is advancing plans to close Ysgol Nebo and Ysgol Baladeulyn due to low pupil numbers and high costs, with the cabinet set to consider statutory notices of closure.

Headline: Closure - Slains School (State), Aberdeenshire
Info: Aberdeenshire Council has published a proposal document regarding the consultation for the closure of Slains School, with plans to merge its catchment area with neighbouring schools.
